introduction: When Nicky (Cliff Richard - Serious Charge) and his friends discover that they are about to loose their beloved youth club they try and find a way to stop property tycoon Hamilton Black (Robert Morley) from knocking it down. The trouble for Nicky is that Hamilton Black is his father and his friends don't know this. But Nicky decides the youth club is more important than his father's plans and along with his friends set about putting on a show in the hope of raising the £1500 they need to keep their youth club.
